positive: A central, highly detailed celestial biome tapestry featuring interconnected elements: a geometric lunar cycle, stylized flowing nebula gas, and silhouettes of various mythic woodland creatures (e.g., fox, deer, owl) woven into the cosmic design. The style should be a fusion of intricate black linework, delicate watercolor wash gradients (deep indigo, teal, and muted gold accents), and minimalist scientific diagram elements. Composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, suitable for a full chest print. Use strong contrast with black lines on a clean, light background. Art must have clean edges and perfect depth, like a tattoo flash sheet illustration.
